description: Example StackGen environment profile structure — set in UI or API

notes.awsAuth: StackGen runner assumes IAM role (e.g. arn:aws:iam::<account>:role/Stackgen_1) — not stored in this JSON
notes.bedrockModels: Enable Claude + Titan Embed in AWS Bedrock console for var.region
notes.ossPrincipal: Set additional_opensearch_data_access_principal_arns on Bedrock canvas resource to deployer role ARN
